local p=string.sub local l=math.floor local j=string.len local t=type local q=string.char local V=table.insert local v=table.concat local A=u for u=-210500-(-210501),#A,-843098-(-843099)do local h=A[u]if t(h)=="\115\116\114\105\110\103"then local t=j(h)local s={}local B=-283493+283494 local o=129236-129236 local return(function(u,j,t,q,V,J,v,A,E,R,I,D,s,o,F,h,B,l,N,Z)l,A,Z,h,E,F,N,I,B,R,s,D,o=function(l,t,q,V)local s0={}local R,Y_,B_,g_,j0,f_,y,V_,J_,c_,q0,P,X,S,Y,k_,g,h0,x_,w_,f,s_,p0,U,n,c,U_,L_,H,j_,W,J0,w,E_,b_,C,d_,t0,G_,V0,v,z_,b,N_,A0,y_,v0,m_,K,p_,R_,e_,t_,H_,X_,o_,q_,x,Q_,i_,i,S_,l0,P_,z,B,O_,M,F_,A_,e,h_,a,Q,h,l_,D_,v_,G,W_,u0,T,m,r_,C_,u_,k,r,N,a_,Z_,I_,n_,M_,T_,K_,O,L,o,d H=-543095+1313095 l=B and H B=8317539-828413 l=l or B end else if l<-690776+1990089 then v=3893833-(-413522)o=1501914-(-751878)B=p(893653-829577)h=B^o l=v-h v=p(-163358+227522)h=l l=v/h
